recommendations.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
recommendations.overview: Inside of his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, Harold finds he has a lot to learn about real life.

recommendations.title: Tod@s Caen

recommendations.title: Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle

recommendations.title: Delta Farce
recommendations.overview: Three bumbling Army reservists are hustled onto a plane headed for combat in Iraq -- but the fact that the plane drops them in Mexico doesn't stop them from "liberating" what they believe to be the Middle East.
